title: ScheduledTriggerProperties
description: ScheduledTriggerProperties schema from Amazon AppFlow API

scheduleExpression.description: The scheduling expression that determines the rate at which the schedule will run, for example rate(5minutes).

dataPullMode.description: Specifies whether a scheduled flow has an incremental data transfer or a complete data transfer for each flow run.

scheduleStartTime.description: The time at which the scheduled flow starts.

scheduleEndTime.description: The time at which the scheduled flow ends.

timezone.description: Specifies the time zone used when referring to the date and time of a scheduled-triggered flow.

scheduleOffset.description: Specifies the optional offset that is added to the time interval for a schedule-triggered flow.

firstExecutionFrom.description: Specifies the date range for the records to import from the connector in the first flow run.

flowErrorDeactivationThreshold.description: Defines how many times a scheduled flow fails consecutively before Amazon AppFlow deactivates it.
